ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bowls" (
  "bowl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowl game */,
  "bowl_name" TEXT /* Name of the bowl game (e.g., Fiesta, Peach) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the bowl game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the bowl game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the bowl game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the bowl game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matchups" (
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each matchup */,
  "bowl_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bowl game the matchup belongs to */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the matchup */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the matchup */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team in the matchup */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team in the matchup */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_bowl_id FOREIGN KEY ("bowl_id") REFERENCES bowls ("bowl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matchups_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Michigan, Georgia) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Big Ten, SEC) */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "fam" INTEGER /* FAM statistic */,
  "style" INTEGER /* STYLE statistic */,
  "qual" INTEGER /* QUAL statistic */,
  "imp" INTEGER /* IMP statistic */,
  "beast" INTEGER /* BEAST statistic */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the team */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the team */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, fan) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup the prediction belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the user (e.g., team1 wins, team2 wins) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the user in their prediction (e.g., 0.8) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup the analysis belongs to */,
  "insight" TEXT /* Insight generated by the platform (e.g., team1 has a 60% chance of winning) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the platform in its insight (e.g., 0.9) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference (e.g., Big Ten, SEC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_conferences" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the team joined the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics model (e.g., logistic regression, decision tree) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the analytics model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., learning rate, number of trees) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytics_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics model the input belongs to */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input (e.g., team1 score, team2 score) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the input */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytics_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics model the output belongs to */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output (e.g., predicted score, confidence level) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the output */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytics_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the team */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the team */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "matchup_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matchup the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "receiving_yards" INTEGER /* Receiving yards gained by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_matchup_id FOREIGN KEY ("matchup_id") REFERENCES matchups ("matchup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
